engineIntelligence.h2: Dodge Journey Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Dodge Journey in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Dodge Journey BWD engine - diesel 2.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: Injector wear - piezo injectors fail from 80k miles causing rough idle and hard starting.
EGR valve clogging - carbon buildup triggers limp mode and reduced power on high-mileage units.
Turbo seal failure - oil leaks and boost loss common after 120k miles on CRD units.

cards.altText: Dodge Journey ED3 engine - petrol 2.4L replacement UK
knownFailures: Oil consumption - piston ring wear causes excessive oil burning from 70k miles on World Engine units.
Timing chain tensioner - plastic guides wear causing cold-start rattle and potential chain skip.
Balance shaft bearing - premature wear leads to knocking noise and eventual engine failure.

cards.altText: Dodge Journey ERB engine - petrol 3.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Rocker arm failure - worn rocker arms cause ticking noise and potential valve damage on Pentastar V6.
Oil cooler leak - gasket failure leads to coolant/oil mixing requiring full engine overhaul.
Variable valve timing solenoid - clogging causes rough idle and reduced power on high-mileage units.

engineGuide.h2: Dodge Journey Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Dodge Journey across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Most common UK Journey diesel; VW-derived CRD architecture with reliable block but injector/EGR vulnerabilities.
compatibleVariants: SE 2.0 CRD, SXT 2.0 CRD, Crossroad 2.0 CRD
commonFailures: Piezo injector failure - rough idle, hard starting, misfires from 80k miles
EGR valve clogging - limp mode, reduced power, black smoke on acceleration
Turbo seal wear - oil consumption, boost loss after 120k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for BWD Dodge Journey engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Updated BWD variant with minor calibration changes; same core architecture and failure patterns.
commonFailures: Injector wear - high-pressure piezo units degrade causing rough running
DPF clogging - short-trip driving accelerates particulate filter blockage
entries.cta: Get quotes for BMR Dodge Journey engine replacement

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: Euro 5-compliant upgrade introduced 2011; improved emissions but timing chain complexity increased.
compatibleVariants: SXT 2.2 CRD, Crossroad 2.2 CRD, Limited 2.2 CRD
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear - cold-start rattle, potential chain skip after 100k miles
AdBlue system faults - NOx sensor failures trigger warning lights
EGR cooler leaks - coolant loss and overheating on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for OM651 Dodge Journey engine replacement

entries.title: 2.4L Petrol
entries.history: Dominant petrol engine for UK Journeys; World Engine design with known oil consumption and timing chain issues.
commonFailures: Oil consumption - piston ring wear causes excessive burning from 70k miles
Timing chain tensioner failure - plastic guides wear causing cold-start rattle
Balance shaft bearing wear - knocking noise precedes catastrophic failure

entries.title: 2.4L Petrol
entries.history: Revised ED3 variant with minor updates; shares core architecture and failure patterns.
commonFailures: Oil consumption - same piston ring design vulnerability as ED3
Timing chain guide wear - cold-start noise indicates impending failure
entries.cta: Get quotes for EDG Dodge Journey engine replacement

entries.title: 3.6L Petrol
entries.history: Flagship Pentastar V6 introduced 2012; powerful but known for rocker arm and oil cooler vulnerabilities.
compatibleVariants: SXT 3.6 V6, Crossroad 3.6 V6, Limited 3.6 V6
commonFailures: Rocker arm failure - ticking noise, potential valve damage on high-mileage units
Oil cooler gasket leak - coolant/oil mixing requires full engine overhaul
VVT solenoid clogging - rough idle and reduced power after 90k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for ERB Dodge Journey engine replacement

entries.title: 2.7L Petrol
entries.history: Early V6 option for 2008-2010 models; oil sludge issues led to Pentastar replacement.
commonFailures: Oil sludge buildup - missed oil changes cause catastrophic bearing failure
Timing chain tensioner wear - cold-start rattle precedes chain skip

commonProblems.h2: Dodge Journey Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Dodge Journey's 2.0 CRD diesel and 2.4L World Engine petrol dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this decision tool to compare repair vs replacement costs.

problems.h4: Dodge Journey Oil Consumption - Why 2.4L World Engine Petrol Units Fail
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Journey SE 2.4, SXT 2.4, Crossroad 2.4 (2008-2016, ED3 & EDG engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Piston ring design allows excessive oil passage into combustion chamber; worsened by short-trip driving and infrequent oil changes.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New piston rings, valve stem seals, gaskets
repairOptions.longevity: May extend life 20-30k miles if caught early; not viable once cylinder scoring occurs

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded rings, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Restores full reliability; best value for engines over 100k miles or with cylinder damage

problems.recommendation: If oil consumption exceeds 1L per 1,000 miles or compression tests show cylinder wear, replacement is more cost-effective than ring replacement. On a Journey worth £3,000-£6,000, a rebuilt ED3 engine preserves residual value.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt ED3 engine prices for your Dodge Journey

problems.h4: Dodge Journey CRD Injector Failure - Diesel Hard Starting & Rough Idle
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Journey SE 2.0 CRD, SXT 2.0 CRD, Crossroad 2.0 CRD (2009-2016, BWD/BMR/OM651 codes)
problems.rootCause: Piezo injectors degrade internally; carbon buildup on tips disrupts spray pattern causing misfires and hard cold starts.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty injectors, coding, fuel system clean
repairOptions.longevity: Restores performance if no secondary damage; injectors may fail again at similar mileage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt diesel with upgraded injectors, turbo inspection, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage CRD units; addresses injector, EGR and turbo wear simultaneously

problems.recommendation: If multiple injectors fail or there's evidence of cylinder scoring from misfires, full replacement offers better long-term value. For isolated injector failure under 90k miles, replacement may suffice.
problems.cta: Get quotes for BWD CRD engine replacement for your Dodge Journey

problems.h4: Dodge Journey Timing Chain Failure - Cold Start Rattle Warning Signs
problems.affectedModels: All Dodge Journey variants with ED3 petrol or OM651 diesel engines (2008-2016)
problems.rootCause: Plastic timing chain guides wear; tensioner loses pressure allowing chain slap that damages guides and can cause valve timing loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New chain, guides, tensioner, seals; engine-out or front-cover access
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before chain skip; prevents catastrophic valve/piston damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded timing components, bench-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if chain has skipped or caused internal damage; restores full reliability

problems.recommendation: Any cold-start rattle on ED3 or OM651 engines warrants immediate inspection. If the chain has skipped even one tooth, replacement is the only safe option - repair risks valve/piston collision.
problems.cta: Compare timing chain repair vs replacement costs for your Dodge Journey

problems.h4: Dodge Journey Turbocharger Failure - Boost Loss & Oil Leaks
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Journey 2.0 CRD and 2.2 CRD diesel variants (BWD, BMR, OM651 engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Turbo bearing wear from oil starvation or carbon buildup; seal failure allows oil into intake/exhaust causing smoke and boost loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New or reconditioned turbo, gaskets, oil feed line inspection
repairOptions.longevity: Restores boost if no secondary damage; ensure oil system is clean to prevent repeat failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt diesel with turbo inspection/replacement, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage CRD units where turbo failure indicates broader wear

problems.recommendation: If turbo failure coincides with high mileage or oil consumption, full engine replacement often proves more economical than turbo-only repair. Always inspect oil feed lines and intercooler for contamination.
problems.cta: Get quotes for OM651 diesel engine replacement for your Dodge Journey

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Dodge Journey
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're facing oil consumption on a 2.4L petrol, injector issues on a 2.0 CRD, or timing chain concerns, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Dodge Journey specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Dodge Journey Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Dodge Journey and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

types.title: Dodge Journey Reconditioned Engines (Recon)

types.frontDescription: Professionally cleaned, inspected and resealed units with worn components replaced; ideal for moderate-mileage Journeys needing reliable power.

engineSizes.h2: Dodge Journey Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Dodge Journey in the UK is listed below with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes.

items.title: Dodge Journey 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0L CRD diesel powered most UK Journeys from launch, offering strong torque for family hauling with reasonable fuel economy. Volkswagen-Audi Group architecture provided proven reliability but injector and EGR vulnerabilities emerged at higher mileage.
items.cta: Get quotes for Dodge Journey 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Dodge Journey 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: Introduced in 2011 for Euro 5 compliance, the 2.2L OM651 diesel offered improved emissions and slightly higher power but added complexity with AdBlue systems and updated timing chain design.
items.cta: Get quotes for Dodge Journey 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Dodge Journey 2.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.4L World Engine petrol was the dominant petrol choice for UK Journeys, delivering adequate power with simple naturally-aspirated design but known oil consumption and timing chain tensioner issues at higher mileage.
commonFailurePoints: Excessive oil consumption from piston ring wear
items.cta: Compare Dodge Journey 2.4L petrol engine prices

items.title: Dodge Journey 2.7L Petrol Engines
items.description: Early 2008-2010 Journeys offered a 2.7L V6 petrol option; oil sludge vulnerabilities and lower power output led to its replacement by the Pentastar family from 2012.
commonFailurePoints: Oil sludge buildup from infrequent changes
items.cta: Compare Dodge Journey 2.7L petrol engine prices

items.title: Dodge Journey 3.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The flagship 3.6L Pentastar V6 arrived in 2012 offering strong performance for Crossroad and Limited trims, though rocker arm and oil cooler vulnerabilities require attention on high-mileage examples.
commonFailurePoints: Rocker arm wear causing valve train noise
items.cta: Compare Dodge Journey 3.6L petrol engine prices

engineYears.h2: Dodge Journey Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Dodge Journey's UK production run (2008-2016), helping owners identify their engine and compare rebuilt replacement prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Launch Generation: World Engine Petrol & Early CRD Diesel
years.description: The Journey launched with 2.4L World Engine petrol and 2.0L CRD diesel options, establishing the JC platform foundation for UK sales.
keyChanges: UK market launch with SE and SXT trim levels
Introduction of 2.4L ED3 petrol and 2.0L BWD CRD diesel engines
FWD standard, AWD available on selected variants
knownFor: ED3 oil consumption emerging as common owner complaint
BWD CRD injector sensitivity to fuel quality
Simple emissions systems avoiding early DPF complexity
years.cta: Get quotes for 2008-2009 Dodge Journey replacement engines
years.ticker: Dodge Journey 2.4 oil consumption fix • Dodge Journey CRD injector replacement • Dodge Journey engine code lookup

years.preview: Mid-Cycle Updates: BMR Diesel & Euro 5 Preparation
years.description: Minor engine calibrations and emissions preparations preceded the significant 2011 Euro 5 update with new 2.2L OM651 diesel.
keyChanges: BMR code introduced as updated variant of BWD 2.0L CRD
Preparation for Euro 5 emissions standards with DPF integration
SXT Plus trim added with enhanced equipment
knownFor: BMR sharing BWD failure patterns with minor calibration differences
Early DPF clogging reports on short-trip CRD vehicles
ED3 timing chain tensioner wear appearing on higher-mileage examples
years.cta: Get quotes for 2010-2011 Dodge Journey replacement engines
years.ticker: Dodge Journey 2.0 CRD hard start • Dodge Journey DPF regeneration failure • Dodge Journey timing chain rattle fix
enquiries: Dodge Journey timing chain rattle fix

years.preview: Major Engine Change: Pentastar V6 & OM651 Diesel
years.description: Significant powertrain update introduced the 3.6L Pentastar V6 and Euro 5-compliant 2.2L OM651 diesel, expanding performance and emissions options.
keyChanges: 3.6L ERB Pentastar V6 introduced for Crossroad and Limited trims
2.2L OM651 diesel replaced 2.0L CRD for Euro 5 compliance
Crossroad trim launched with distinctive styling and equipment
knownFor: OM651 timing chain tensioner complexity requiring specialist attention
Pentastar V6 rocker arm wear causing valve train noise after 90k miles
Crossroad trim commanding premium pricing in used market
years.cta: Get quotes for 2012-2013 Dodge Journey replacement engines
years.ticker: Dodge Journey OM651 timing chain fix • Dodge Journey Pentastar rocker arm replacement • Dodge Journey Crossroad engine options

years.preview: Final Production Years: Refined Powertrains & End of Line
years.description: Final production years saw refined calibrations and component updates before Journey production concluded, with late examples offering best value for replacement buyers.
keyChanges: Minor ECU calibrations improving driveability and emissions performance
Component updates addressing known failure points on ED3 and OM651
Production concluded in 2016 with SXT Plus and Crossroad as final trims
knownFor: Late-production units benefiting from component refinements
Strong residual values for low-mileage Crossroad and Limited examples
Comprehensive service history critical for high-mileage replacement assessment

faq.h2: Dodge Journey Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Dodge Journey engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Typical rebuilt engine prices range from £1,600 for 2.0 CRD diesel to £3,800 for 3.6L Pentastar V6, supply-only. Supply & fit adds £400-£800 labour depending on location and garage.
keyPoints: 2.0L CRD diesel rebuilt: £1,600-£3,200 supply only
2.4L petrol World Engine rebuilt: £1,800-£3,500 supply only
3.6L Pentastar V6 rebuilt: £3,500-£3,800 supply only
Labour for supply & fit typically £400-£800 additional
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Dodge Journey engine prices for your variant

items.question: What engine codes fit my Dodge Journey?
items.answer: Common UK Journey engine codes include BWD/BMR/OM651 for diesel and ED3/EDG/ERB for petrol. Enter your registration above to verify the exact code for your variant.
keyPoints: Diesel codes: BWD, BMR (2.0L CRD), OM651 (2.2L Euro 5 CRD)
Petrol codes: ED3, EDG (2.4L World Engine), ERB (3.6L Pentastar V6)
Engine code determines FWD/AWD and manual/auto compatibility
DVLA lookup via registration confirms exact fitment
items.cta: Check Dodge Journey engine compatibility with your reg

items.question: Is a rebuilt Dodge Journey engine reliable?
items.answer: Yes, when sourced from vetted UK specialists with upgraded components addressing known failure points. All EngineMarket rebuilt engines include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.
keyPoints: Rebuilt units include upgraded rings for ED3 oil consumption issues
CRD rebuilt engines feature reinforced injectors and timing components
Pentastar V6 rebuilds address rocker arm and oil cooler vulnerabilities
Bench testing and warranty provide replacement confidence
items.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt Dodge Journey engines with warranty

items.question: How long does Dodge Journey engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical turnaround is 3-5 working days for engine supply, plus 1-2 days for fitting at a specialist garage. Supply & fit packages coordinate delivery and installation.
keyPoints: Engine supply: 3-5 working days from order confirmation
Garage fitting: 1-2 working days depending on complexity
Supply & fit packages coordinate timing for minimal downtime
Urgent MOT failure replacements often prioritised by network garages
items.cta: Find Dodge Journey engine supply & fit deals near you

items.question: What causes Dodge Journey engine failure?
items.answer: Most common causes are oil consumption on 2.4L petrol (piston rings), injector/EGR failure on CRD diesel, and timing chain wear across both fuel types.
keyPoints: ED3 petrol: Piston ring wear causes excessive oil consumption
CRD diesel: Piezo injector degradation and EGR clogging
All variants: Timing chain tensioner wear after 90k+ miles
Pentastar V6: Rocker arm failure causing valve train noise
items.cta: Compare Dodge Journey engine replacement options by failure type

items.question: Should I repair or replace my Dodge Journey engine?
items.answer: Replacement is usually more cost-effective for engines over 100k miles or with cylinder damage. Repair may suit lower-mileage vehicles with isolated faults like single injector failure.
keyPoints: Repair viable for isolated issues under 90k miles with sound block
Replacement preferred for oil consumption, timing chain skip, or multiple failures
Consider vehicle residual value when deciding repair vs replace
Rebuilt engine with warranty often preserves Journey's market value
items.cta: Get expert advice on Dodge Journey repair vs replacement

items.question: Does Dodge Journey engine come with warranty?
items.answer: Yes, all engines supplied through EngineMarket include minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Confirm exact terms with your chosen specialist before ordering.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard on rebuilt units
Used engines typically carry shorter 3-6 month warranties
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
items.cta: Compare Dodge Journey engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: Where can I get Dodge Journey engine supply and fit?
items.answer: EngineMarket's nationwide network includes vetted UK garages experienced with Journey engine replacement. Enter your postcode to find local supply & fit options.
keyPoints: 100+ specialist garages across UK with Journey experience
Coordinated engine delivery and fitting appointment scheduling
Single-point contact for warranty and support queries
Mobile fitting available in some regions for urgent replacements
items.cta: Find Dodge Journey engine supply & fit near your location

items.question: How do I know which Dodge Journey engine I need?
items.answer: Enter your registration above for instant DVLA verification of your exact model, engine code and fuel type. This ensures perfect fitment for FWD/AWD and transmission compatibility.
keyPoints: Registration lookup confirms engine code, variant and production year
Engine code determines compatibility with your transmission type
FWD vs AWD requires specific engine mounting and drivetrain components
Manual vs automatic engines have different flywheel and ECU configurations
items.cta: Verify your Dodge Journey engine code with reg check

items.question: Can I upgrade my Dodge Journey engine?
items.answer: Engine swaps are possible but complex due to ECU, wiring and drivetrain compatibility. Most owners opt for like-for-like rebuilt replacements to preserve reliability and warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Like-for-like rebuilt engines maintain original reliability and warranty
Pentastar V6 swap into 2.4L models requires extensive ECU/drivetrain modification
Diesel-to-petrol or petrol-to-diesel conversions rarely cost-effective
Consult specialist before considering non-standard engine options
items.cta: Speak to Dodge Journey engine specialists about upgrade options
